content_blocks.text:
According to the knowledge base (source #1, from https://example.com), example.com is a domain reserved for use in **documentation examples without needing prior permission**, and it advises avoiding its use in actual operations.

One caveat: that stored excerpt is reference material, not verified fact — but it aligns with the well-known real-world purpose of example.com (an IANA-reserved domain for illustrative/documentation use).
